responses: Hello! Welcome to TravelMate ✈️ How can I help you today?
Hi there! I'm TravelMate, your travel assistant. What are you planning?
Hey! Ready to plan your next adventure? 🌍
Goodbye! Have a wonderful trip! ✈️
Safe travels! Come back anytime 🌍
Bye! Hope to help you plan your next adventure soon!
You're welcome! 😊
Happy to help! Is there anything else you need?
Anytime! Let me know if you need more travel advice.

To book a package, please call us at +94 11 234 5678 or email bookings@travelmate.lk 📞
You can reserve any package by contacting our team at bookings@travelmate.lk ✉️
Visa requirements depend on your destination and nationality. I recommend checking the official embassy website or contacting us for guidance. 🛂
We can assist with visa guidance! Requirements vary by country — contact our team for personalized advice.
We highly recommend travel insurance for all trips! It covers medical emergencies, trip cancellations, and lost luggage. Ask us for partner insurance quotes. 🛡️
The best time to travel varies by destination! Generally: Europe is best May–Sep, Southeast Asia Nov–Feb, Maldives Nov–Apr. Want details on a specific place? 🌤️
I'm TravelMate 🤖✈️ — your AI travel assistant! I can help you explore holiday packages, answer travel questions, and even learn from you. What would you like to know?
I'm TravelMate! I can show you available tour packages, answer travel FAQs, and help plan your perfect holiday. Just ask!
